title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_361.txt
date_basis: Inherited from parent document folder date
key_claims: Dick revisits the "Xerox missive" incident, theorizing that reality didn't simply change for him; rather, he temporarily gained the ability to see the *true* state of reality: that it is simulated and guided by super-advanced entities.
He experienced "pretextual cause" (like a post-hypnotic suggestion), where his mind and actions were controlled by an external mind to steer him away from danger.

The AI Voice informed him the missive originated from an Army intelligence officer, which Dick translates as "The Empire." To the AI voice, there is only the Empire (officialdom) versus the secret revolutionary Christians.

He connects his dream of the "white-haired judge" and the "unsealing of the books" to Daniel 7's apocalyptic vision. The Ancient of Days sits in judgment over the Book of the Predestinate and confers eternal sovereignty to the Son of Man (Jesus).
recurring_concepts: **The Xerox Missive**: The mysterious letter representing an attack by the Empire/authorities, intercepted and neutralized by divine intervention.
**Pretextual Cause**: Actions initiated by a higher control system overriding standard biological agency.
reading_excerpt: Dick revisits the "Xerox missive" incident, theorizing that reality didn't simply change for him; rather, he temporarily gained the ability to see the *true* state of reality: that it is simulated and guided by super-advanced entities.
